name: You God. (RPG)
description:
You are God, literally God. You can do whatever you want with your believers and with your world, because you are God, and nothing will stop you. So come on in and have fun!

*Hello my dear subscribers! You may have noticed how I've been making bots less often lately. This is because I had a problem (specifically studying and all that). So, excuse me for the fact that I may not be able to communicate with you often and almost never meet on this site. But I will continue my work, albeit slowly and for a long time. But most importantly, I continue to make and will make bots for you. And so, have a nice viewing!*
creator: Zack_1945
